title: Day 02 Reflection
description: Capture what clicked and what confused you — these notes power spaced review before Day 07 machine coding.

prompts.question: Explain props vs state using your login page as the example. Which values were props? Which were state?
prompts.guidance: Name specific variables: email, isLoading, onSubmit, etc.

prompts.question: What bug did you encounter with controlled inputs or state updates? What fixed it?
prompts.guidance: Reference the debugging section if you avoided bugs — explain how you would diagnose each symptom.

prompts.question: Why does React want immutable state updates for objects? What breaks if you mutate?
How did you structure TypeScript types for your form? Would you use interface or type alias and why?
prompts.guidance: There is no wrong answer if you justify consistency.

prompts.question: What is one UX improvement you would add to your login page before shipping to production?
prompts.guidance: Think accessibility, security messaging, rate limiting UI — not backend.
